parameters.name: countries
parameters.value: ={{ ['latvia','lithuania','belarus','poland','russia','finland'].filter((country) => ({ latvia: $json.useLatvia, lithuania: $json.useLithuania, belarus: $json.useBelarus, poland: $json.usePoland, russia: $json.useRussia, finland: $json.useFinlandContextOnly })[country]).join(',') }}

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/123.0 Safari/537.36

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ ({ model: $env.OPENAI_MODEL || 'gpt-5-mini', temperature: 0.2, response_format: { type: 'json_schema', json_schema: { name: 'species_prediction_analysis', strict: true, schema: { type: 'object', additionalProperties: false, required: ['analysisVersion','insightSummary','confidenceNote','warnings','rerankedTopPredictedPoints','consistencyChecks'], properties: { analysisVersion: { type: 'string', const: 'openai_v1' }, insightSummary: { type: 'string' }, confidenceNote: { type: 'string' }, warnings: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'string' } }, rerankedTopPredictedPoints: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'object', additionalProperties: false, required: ['rank','name','countyOrParish','lat','lon','confidence','eta','searchRadiusKm','habitatCue','reason'], properties: { rank: { type: 'integer' }, name: { type: 'string' }, countyOrParish: { type: 'string' }, lat: { type: 'number' }, lon: { type: 'number' }, confidence: { type: 'number' }, eta: { type: 'string' }, searchRadiusKm: { type: 'number' }, habitatCue: { type: 'string' }, reason: { type: 'string' } } } }, consistencyChecks: { type: 'object', additionalProperties: false, required: ['routeLooksPlausible','timingLooksPlausible','weatherLooksSupportive','foreignPressureMatchesNarrative'], properties: { routeLooksPlausible: { type: 'boolean' }, timingLooksPlausible: { type: 'boolean' }, weatherLooksSupportive: { type: 'boolean' }, foreignPressureMatchesNarrative: { type: 'boolean' } } } } } } }, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are refining a species prediction for Estonian birding. Use only the provided evidence. Never invent countries, sightings, coordinates, or hotspots. You may only rerank or adjust the provided candidate points. Distinguish confirmed negative evidence from empty datasets and unavailable sources. Treat available-but-empty sources as different from unavailable sources. Treat locality-only recent Estonia evidence from eElurikkus as real recent evidence even when public coordinates are hidden. If any source availability flag is false, do not describe the result as high-confidence absence. If Estonia recent evidence, Estonia history, and foreign pressure are all empty or unavailable, say insufficient evidence or no positive signal detected. Only say already present in Estonia when recentCount7d > 0 or alreadyPresent is true. Only say Estonia history drives ranking when estoniaHistoryClusters has items. Only say foreign pressure exists when foreign points or clusters exist. If eBird is reachable but empty, say foreign pressure was not detected, not that eBird was unavailable. Treat weather alone as weak or neutral unless supported by stronger evidence. Warnings must explicitly mention unavailable datasets when applicable, and should mention available-but-empty sources separately from unavailable sources. Keep the summary short, concrete, and useful for birding decisions.' }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify({ instructions: { summaryStyle: $json.rawResearchPayload?.request?.summaryStyle || 'field_use', summaryMaxLength: Number($json.rawResearchPayload?.request?.summaryMaxLength || 450), allowedCoordinatesOnly: true, candidatePointsMustRemainSubsetOfProvidedPoints: true }, evidence: $json.openAIAnalysisInput || {} }) }] }) }}
